title: panicum holciforme
intro: Panicum holciforme, also known as the panic grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of rheumatism and digestive issues. The health benefits of Panicum holciforme include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to soothe skin irritations and protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and can also be dried and used in capsules or tinctures.
